summary: Completed comprehensive testing of mentor availability and booking flow. All 5 requested features are working correctly: Mentor Availability Tab, Mentor Booking Flow, Time Slots Display, Booking in Upcoming Sessions, and Session Count Decrement.

issues: Sessions remaining count in UI may show stale data until page refresh after booking

critical_code_review_comments: Frontend sessions remaining display may show cached value - consider refreshing user data after successful booking in CoachingPage.jsx
test_credentials: Mock login: 'mentor' for mentor dashboard, 'last_mile' or 'mid_mile' for user with coaching sessions
seed_data_creation: Test bookings created during testing: Priya Sharma 2026-01-20 10:00, Rahul Mehta 2026-01-21 15:00
context_for_next_testing_agent: All mentor availability and booking features tested and working. Backend APIs: /api/mentor-dashboard/availability (GET/PUT), /api/mentors/{id}/book (POST), /api/mentors/bookings/my (GET). Frontend: MentorDashboard.jsx Availability tab working with Save button, CoachingPage.jsx booking modal with date/time selection working.

mentor_availability_tab.details: Mentor can view 14-day calendar, select time slots (09:00-18:00), and save availability. Save Availability button triggers PUT /api/mentor-dashboard/availability

mentor_booking_flow.details: User with coaching plan can click mentor card, see modal with mentor profile, select date, select time slot, and book session

time_slots_display.details: Time slots correctly display when user selects a date. Both 'slots' and 'time_slots' field names are handled by frontend

booking_in_upcoming_sessions.details: After booking, session appears in 'Your Upcoming Sessions' section with mentor name, date, time, and status

session_count_decrement.details: Backend correctly decrements coaching_sessions_used after booking. Verified via /api/auth/me endpoint
